globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 50
CAST(@age@ AS INT64) > 1111
CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 25
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 26
CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 34
CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 21
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) > 21
SELECT
globalRule.expression:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS totalRecords,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed
FROM INTERNALQUERY;

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: Age IS NOT NULL AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64)
globalRule.expression:
Age IS NOT NULL
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT CASE WHEN Age IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age_condition_flag FROM INTERNALQUERY
globalRule.expression: SELECT CASE WHEN Age IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age_condition_flag FROM INTERNALQUERY

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY
globalRule.expression: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT CAST(date_of_joining AS DATE) AS Date, COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY GROUP BY CAST(date_of_joining AS DATE)
globalRule.expression: SELECT DATE(date_of_joining) AS Date, COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY GROUP BY DATE(date_of_joining)

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT emp_id, CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PASSED' END AS rule_status FROM INTERNALQUERY
globalRule.expression: SELECT emp_id, CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PASSED' END AS rule_status FROM INTERNALQUERY

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT emp_id, CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PASSED' END AS rule_status FROM INTERNALQUERY;
globalRule.expression:
SELECT
  emp_id,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@ THEN 'FAILED'
    ELSE 'PASSED'
  END AS rule_status
FROM INTERNALQUERY;

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: Age IS NOT NULL AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64)
globalRule.expression:
Age IS NOT NULL
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: education = 'High School' AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > CAST(@Age@ AS INT64) AND date_of_joining < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
globalRule.expression:
education = 'High School'
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > @Age@
AND date_of_joining < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
